info.name: Plan Types Collection
info.description:
All plan type variations for tanso-core monetization API, including credit-based plans.

Billing models: FLAT, USAGE
Billing timing: IN_ADVANCE (auto for FLAT), IN_ARREARS (auto for USAGE)
Statuses: DRAFT, ACTIVE, ARCHIVED
Default intervalMonths: 3 (if omitted)

Credit system: Plans can include credits via PlanFeatureRule with credit_included model. Credits are managed through pools, grants, deductions, and a full transaction ledger.

Grant types: PLAN_INCLUDED, PURCHASED, PROMOTIONAL, REFUND, SYSTEM, ROLLOVER, MANUAL
Rollover policies: NONE, FULL, CAPPED
Pool statuses: ACTIVE, FROZEN, DEPLETED, ARCHIVED

item.name: Create Plans

body.raw:
{
  "key": "flat-monthly-advance",
  "name": "Standard Monthly Plan",
  "description": "Flat monthly plan billed in advance",
  "priceAmount": 49.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT"
}

request.description: Creates a standard flat-rate monthly plan. billingTiming auto-set to IN_ADVANCE.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "flat-monthly-arrears",
  "name": "Flat Monthly In Arrears",
  "description": "Flat monthly plan with arrears billing timing override",
  "priceAmount": 39.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "billingTiming": "IN_ARREARS",
  "status": "DRAFT"
}

request.description: Flat plan with explicit IN_ARREARS timing. Tests whether the API accepts a timing override for FLAT billing model.
Usage-based plan with no fixed price. billingTiming auto-set to IN_ARREARS.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "usage-advance",
  "name": "Usage In Advance",
  "description": "Usage-based plan with advance billing timing override",
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "USAGE",
  "billingTiming": "IN_ADVANCE",
  "status": "DRAFT"
}

request.description: Usage plan with explicit IN_ADVANCE timing. Tests whether the API accepts a timing override for USAGE billing model.
Quarterly billing cadence (intervalMonths=3). This is also the default if intervalMonths is omitted.
Annual billing cadence (intervalMonths=12).
Hybrid plan: flat base price with usage-tracked features linked via plan-feature rules. The plan itself is FLAT; usage metering is handled at the feature level.
Free tier with priceAmount=0. Uses FLAT billing model.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "enterprise-custom",
  "name": "Enterprise Plan",
  "description": "Enterprise plan with rich metadata for custom configuration",
  "priceAmount": 999.99,
  "intervalMonths": "12",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "enterprise",
    "supportLevel": "priority",
    "slaUptimePercent": 99.9,
    "dedicatedAccountManager": true,
    "customBranding": true,
    "maxSeats": 500
  }
}

request.description: Enterprise plan with extensive metadata. Tests JSONB storage of arbitrary key-value data.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "credit-starter-hard",
  "name": "Credit Starter (Hard Limit)",
  "description": "Credit-based plan with 500 credits/month, no rollover, hard limit blocks access at zero balance. Credits are granted via PlanFeatureRule with credit_included model on subscription.",
  "priceAmount": 29.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "credit-starter",
    "creditAmount": 500,
    "creditDenomination": "CREDITS",
    "rolloverPolicy": "NONE",
    "hardLimit": true
  }
}

request.description: Credit plan: 500 credits/month, no rollover, hard limit. Access blocked when credits depleted. Credits are actually provisioned when a PlanFeatureRule with credit_included model is linked to this plan and a customer subscribes.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "credit-pro-rollover",
  "name": "Credit Pro (Full Rollover)",
  "description": "Credit-based plan with 2000 credits/month, full rollover of unused credits, hard limit.",
  "priceAmount": 79.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "credit-pro",
    "creditAmount": 2000,
    "creditDenomination": "CREDITS",
    "rolloverPolicy": "FULL",
    "hardLimit": true
  }
}

request.description: Credit plan with FULL rollover: all unused credits carry forward to the next period indefinitely.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "credit-business-capped",
  "name": "Credit Business (Capped Rollover)",
  "description": "Credit-based plan with 5000 credits/month, capped rollover at 2500, hard limit.",
  "priceAmount": 199.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "credit-business",
    "creditAmount": 5000,
    "creditDenomination": "CREDITS",
    "rolloverPolicy": "CAPPED",
    "rolloverCap": 2500,
    "hardLimit": true
  }
}

request.description: Credit plan with CAPPED rollover: unused credits roll forward up to the cap (2500). Excess above cap is forfeited.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "credit-growth-soft",
  "name": "Credit Growth (Soft Limit)",
  "description": "Credit-based plan with 1000 credits/month, no rollover, soft limit allows overage.",
  "priceAmount": 49.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "credit-growth",
    "creditAmount": 1000,
    "creditDenomination": "CREDITS",
    "rolloverPolicy": "NONE",
    "hardLimit": false
  }
}

request.description: Credit plan with soft limit (hardLimit=false): access continues after credits depleted, overage tracked separately.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "ai-tokens-plan",
  "name": "AI Token Plan",
  "description": "Credit-based plan using TOKENS denomination for AI workloads. 100000 tokens/month.",
  "priceAmount": 59.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "ai-tokens",
    "creditAmount": 100000,
    "creditDenomination": "TOKENS",
    "rolloverPolicy": "NONE",
    "hardLimit": true
  }
}

request.description: Credit plan using TOKENS denomination instead of CREDITS. Tests that the pool denomination is flexible.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "credit-expiring",
  "name": "Credit Plan (Expiring Grants)",
  "description": "Credit-based plan where each grant expires after 3 months. 1500 credits/month.",
  "priceAmount": 69.99,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "credit-expiring",
    "creditAmount": 1500,
    "creditDenomination": "CREDITS",
    "grantExpiresMonths": 3,
    "rolloverPolicy": "FULL",
    "hardLimit": true
  }
}

request.description: Credit plan where each monthly grant expires 3 months after issuance. Uses FULL rollover so grants accumulate, but each one individually expires. Tests grant_expires_months on the credit_included model.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "credit-annual-bulk",
  "name": "Annual Credit Plan",
  "description": "Annual credit plan with a single large grant of 50000 credits upfront, 12-month expiry.",
  "priceAmount": 899.99,
  "intervalMonths": "12",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "credit-annual",
    "creditAmount": 50000,
    "creditDenomination": "CREDITS",
    "grantExpiresMonths": 12,
    "rolloverPolicy": "NONE",
    "hardLimit": true
  }
}

request.description: Annual billing with a large one-time credit grant. Tests credit_included model on a non-monthly cadence.

body.raw:
{
  "key": "free-with-credits",
  "name": "Free Tier with Credits",
  "description": "Free plan that includes 100 credits/month with hard limit. No rollover.",
  "priceAmount": 0,
  "intervalMonths": "1",
  "billingModel": "FLAT",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metadata": {
    "tier": "free",
    "creditAmount": 100,
    "creditDenomination": "CREDITS",
    "rolloverPolicy": "NONE",
    "hardLimit": true
  }
}

request.description: Free tier that still grants a small number of credits. Tests credit provisioning on a zero-price plan.

item.description: One request per plan type variant: different billing models, cadences, credit configurations, and rollover policies.

item.name: Manage Plans

request.description: List all plans for the authenticated account.
Update an existing plan by UUID. Only provided fields are changed (null fields are ignored). Status transitions: DRAFT->ACTIVE, ACTIVE->ARCHIVED, ARCHIVED->ACTIVE.
Soft-delete a plan by UUID. Also cascade-deletes associated PlanFeatureRule records.
Get all features linked to a specific plan. Returns PlanFeatureLinkedDto with plan details and feature list.

item.description: List, update, delete plans and view linked features.

item.name: Credit Pools

request.description: Create a credit pool with CREDITS denomination, hard limit, no rollover. Pool names must be unique per account.
Credit pool with TOKENS denomination and CAPPED rollover policy. Tests alternate denomination and rollover cap.
Pool with soft limit (hardLimit=false) and FULL rollover. Access not blocked at zero balance; overage accrues.
List all credit pools for the authenticated account.
Get a specific credit pool by ID. Returns balance, totals (granted, consumed, expired, reversed), and configuration.
List all credit pools scoped to a specific customer.

item.description: Create and query credit pools. Pools hold credit balances per denomination (CREDITS, TOKENS, etc.) and define rollover/limit behavior.

item.name: Credit Grants

request.description: Manually grant 500 credits to a pool. Uses idempotencyKey to prevent duplicate grants.
Promotional credit grant with explicit expiration date. Tests PROMOTIONAL grant type and expiresAt field.
Grant credits that were purchased separately (top-up). Tests PURCHASED grant type.
Simulates a plan-included credit grant linked to a subscription. Normally auto-created by processCreditGrantsForSubscription, but can be tested manually.
List all credit grants for a specific pool. Shows amount, remaining, grantType, expiresAt, and voidedAt.

item.description: Grant credits to pools using different grant types (MANUAL, PROMOTIONAL, PURCHASED, PLAN_INCLUDED). Tests idempotency, expiration, and subscription linkage.

item.name: Credit Deductions & Transactions

request.description: Deduct 50 credits from the pool. Reduces the remaining balance of the oldest non-expired grant first (FIFO).
Deduct credits linked to a specific subscription and customer for tracking.
List the full transaction ledger for a pool. Shows GRANT, DEDUCTION, EXPIRATION, REVERSAL, ADJUSTMENT, FREEZE, UNFREEZE entries with balanceBefore/balanceAfter.
Reverse a specific transaction by ID. Creates a REVERSAL entry in the ledger and restores the credit balance.

item.description: Deduct credits from pools, view the transaction ledger, and reverse transactions.

item.name: Pool-Subscription Linkage

query.description: Priority order for multi-pool deductions (lower = higher priority)

request.description: Link a credit pool to a subscription. drawPriority controls which pool is drawn from first when a customer has multiple pools.

item.name: Link Pool to Subscription (with Draw Limit)

query.description: Lower priority than the primary pool
Maximum credits that can be drawn from this pool per period

request.description: Link a pool with a draw limit (max 500 credits per period) and lower priority. Tests multi-pool draw ordering and per-pool caps.
Remove the link between a credit pool and a subscription.

item.description: Link and unlink credit pools to subscriptions. Controls draw priority and per-pool draw limits for multi-pool scenarios.
